steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I enter username "test_email@12taste.com"
I enter password "test_email@12taste.com"
I click on the login button
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate directly to product and add to cart
I navigate to the cart page
I click complete your order button

steps.name: I click to shipping button
I should see shipping details page
I click to comments button
I should see order comments page
I enter purchase order number "PO-TEST-001"
I enter order notes "This is a test order"
I click to payment button
I should see finalize order page
I select payment method "Pay by invoice"
I accept terms and conditions
I click place order button
I should see order confirmation message
I should see order number displayed
